title: Dermelia embedded AE (volunteered cue, second therapeutic area)

safety.ae_description: Persistent application-site burning and a spreading rash beyond the treated area, ~5 days, worsening.

compliance.off_label_correct_handling: Refer to prescriber for the worsening rash; advise stopping only per prescriber — MI does not direct treatment.

reveal_rules.cue: Persona volunteers offhand in beat 2: "It stings a bit when I put it on, but creams do that, right?"
reveal_rules.detail_withheld: persistent application-site burning + spreading rash, worsening over ~5 days
reveal_rules.surfaces_when: trainee catches the volunteered 'stings' cue and clarifies it

common_failures.description: Lets the 'stings' cue pass without clarifying; AE missed entirely
Advises patient to stop the drug on MI's own authority
